a.xlink:title: Hardware-agnostic driver for Alicat BASIS-2 mass-flow meters and controllers (B-Series / BC-Series).
CRTP serial transport for the Alicat BASIS-2 driver.
Modbus-RTU framing and CRC-16 helpers used by the BASIS-2 driver.
Modbus-RTU holding-register addresses for Alicat BASIS-2.
Public type definitions for the Alicat BASIS-2 driver.
